summary: W1520 connects the W1519 W987 W735/W732 selected-cochain convergence surface to the existing W1374 endpoint-facts/localized selected-cochain convergence guard. It specializes W1374's W874-to-W873 endpoint-facts projection and W873-to-W872 homology-free selected-cochain delegation on both closed-map and closed-embedding branches, records preservation of W1519 boundary/closedness data and W726 endpoint/localized projections, composes the W1519 W875 path through W873/W872, preserves the 74-input ledger, and leaves the final original four-task completion surface nonterminal with productSuccessClaimed=false.
known_gaps: Positive Lean witness is absent: ProductSuccessDeclarations.lean does not import or check an OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess surface with field-level evidence for the original four-task contract.
Final imported completion surface remains nonterminal: originalFourTaskContractCompletion.productSuccessClaimed = false still compiles.

W1520 only routes the W1519/W1518/W1517/W1516/W1515/W1514/W1513/W1512/W1511/W1510/W1498 74-field surface through the existing W1374 endpoint-facts/localized selected-cochain convergence guard to W873/W872; it does not prove the 74 constructor inputs from independent mathematical data.

Original four mathematical tasks remain open under the positive-witness supplement; the current route still relies on assumed boundary, relation, target-surjectivity, target-compactness, mapped-cokernel, selected-difference, strict-preimage, normalized-lift, fixed-target uniqueness, source-triangulation, endpoint, localized-unit, unit mapping-cone, and selected-cochain fields rather than a positive product witness.
remaining_work: Continue Lean implementation toward a positive OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess-style declaration backed by actual exact-category, metrizable LCA exact-category, Yoneda-Ext, and bounded derived infinity-category constructions.

Discharge the W1520/W1519/W1518/W1517/W1516/W1515/W1514/W1513/W1512/W1511/W1510/W1509/W1508/W1507/W1506/W1505/W1504/W1503/W1502/W1501/W1500/W1499/W1498/W1497/W1496/W1495 route inputs and remaining W1494 constructor inputs, or replace the field-ledger route with an explicit positive witness satisfying the positive-witness supplement.
Before any product-success claim, rerun the source-contradiction gate, negative fixtures, clean checkout verification, root external audit, and clean-extracted packet audit.
